name: Ziti Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim and remove stems from mushrooms. Quarter large mushrooms.
2. Melt 1 tablespoon butter or margarine in a large skillet over moderate heat.
3. Stir-fry mushroom caps and stems for 1 minute until coated. Remove from skillet.
4. Add 1 tablespoon oil, broccoli, and carrots to the skillet. Stir-fry for 1 minute.
5. Add 1 cup water; cover and cook for 3 minutes until vegetables are crisp-tender. Drain excess liquid.
6. Melt 4 tablespoons butter or margarine. Stir in 3 tablespoons flour. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Continue stirring and slowly add light cream. Increase heat slightly.
8. Stir in 1 cup Parmesan cheese, 1 cup sharp Cheddar cheese, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper. Mix until sauce thickens and bubbles.
9. Gently mix cooked and drained ziti with mushrooms, carrots, broccoli, and walnuts in a large bowl.
10. Add the cheese sauce to the pasta mixture and toss gently.
11. Transfer contents into a 2-quart baking dish. Cover tightly with foil.
12. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour before baking.
13. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Bake for 25 minutes.
